description: This file defines a utility object 'SplitUtils' with functions to split a string into tokens based on spaces and store them in a linked list. It contains internal helper functions for token validation and addition to the list.

classes.name: SplitUtils
classes.description: A singleton object providing string splitting utility functions.

methods.name: split
methods.description: Splits the input string into tokens separated by spaces and returns a linked list of tokens.

methods.name: addIfValid
methods.description: Adds a token to the list if it passes validation.

methods.name: isTokenValid
methods.description: Checks whether a token is non-empty and thus valid.
